Fremont STEAM Magnet High School — Los Angeles, CA** High School Diploma — 2023 • Honors Graduate (3.9 GPA) | Jaime Escalante Math Program --- ## WORK EXPERIENCE **GAP Factory, Sales Associate / Customer Service — Los Angeles, CA** October 2024 - Present • Guide 40+ customers per shift by answering questions, and locating merchandise to support a positive shopping experience. • Lead team members in handling high-volume traffic during peak hours, sustaining smooth store flow and cutting down wait times. • Set shelves and promotional displays to merchandising standards, decreasing misplaced items by 25%. • Promote sales by highlighting promotions and upselling complementary products, contributing to weekly revenue goals. **Dollar Tree, Cashier/Stock Associate — Los Angeles, CA** September 2023 - February 2024 • Reduced average wait times by 15% while upholding store service standards and customer satisfaction. • Supervised daily service standards and resolved an average of customer needs per shift in a fast-paced retail environment, improved checkout flow and overall customer satisfaction. • Addressed visual merchandising standards by setting up shelves and promotional displays, decreased misplaced items by 25%. **Student2Student Program, Peer Tutor & Student Mentor — Los Angeles, CA** September 2022 - July 2023 • Promoted a positive and supportive environment for student growth and development and engaged with two trustees. • Enhanced daily math and reading instruction, reinforced lesson objective and fostered measurable growth in academic performance. • Delivered one-on-one and small-group tutoring sessions for elementary and middle school students, tailoring lessons to diverse learning styles. --- ## LEADERSHIP EXPERIENCE & ACTIVITIES **Girls Soccer Team - John C. Fremont HS, Team Member** August 2019 - February 2023 • Participated in 100+ practices and 40+ games over four seasons, balancing athletics with academics while demonstrating time management and discipline. • Supported and motivated 20+ teammates during practices and games, contributing to a stronger sense of collaboration and team spirit. • Gained leadership and communication skills by serving as an informal peer leader, helping teammates improve performance during drills and matches. • Contributed to overall team success, helping secure multiple league wins and consistent playoff appearances. **Just Keep Livin (JKL) Program - John C. Fremont HS, Participant** August 2019 - February 2023 • Engaged in weekly wellness and leadership workshops across four years, covering goal setting, health, self-development, and decision-making. • Facilitated small-group discussions and fitness activities for 10–15 peers, creating a safe and supportive environment for personal growth. • Developed resilience and self-awareness by completing multiple community service and reflection projects, building confidence and leadership potential. --- ## SKILLS & INTERESTS Computer: Microsoft , Google Docs /Slide Languages: English (Fluent) , Spanish (Intermediate) Skills: Customer service, Communication skills, Time management , Team collaboration --- ## LICENSES & CERTIFICATIONS • Google Analytics 4 (GA4) Certification – Google Digital Academy (Skillshop), Feb 2026 – Feb 2027 • Power BI Essential Training – LinkedIn Learning, Feb 2026 • Excel: PivotTables in Depth – LinkedIn Learning, Jan 2026 • Project Management Foundations – LinkedIn Learning, Feb 2025 --- ## Download Resume Download PDF Resume
